name: Kothamallipodi (Dry Coriander Leaf Chutney)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan.
2. Stir-fry curry leaves, black gram dal, and asafoetida until the dal turns brown.
3. Add red chilies and cook for a few minutes.
4. Allow the mixture to cool.
5. Add chopped coriander leaves, tamarind pulp, and salt.
6. Blend everything in a mixer until well combined.
7. Store the chutney in an airtight bottle or pickle jar.
